overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked neon-lit futuristic city. The player character walks along wet sidewalks, passes pedestrians with umbrellas, enters a covered NCART metro station, and continues past outdoor seating areas with holographic advertisements visible on towering skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: open cyberpunk street with towering neon-lit skyscrapers

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at skyscrapers then tilts down to street level
begins walking forward along the wet sidewalk

agents.ego_description: tilting head up to admire the towering neon skyscrapers, then walking forward along the rain-soaked street

notable_agents.action: walking with a black umbrella, wearing dark clothing

entered.detail: tall futuristic buildings with cyan neon trim and holographic advertisements
tall palm trees lining the street
futuristic street lamps with yellow neon accents

segments.scene_description: The clip opens with a view looking up at massive neon-lit skyscrapers in a futuristic city. The camera tilts down and begins walking along a wet sidewalk reflecting the cyan and pink neon lights. A pedestrian with an umbrella walks toward the camera as light rain falls.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sidewalk approaching metro station entrance

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk, passing pedestrians and approaching the metro station entrance

notable_agents.action: person in blue cap and green shirt walking in same direction

entered.detail: covered metro station entrance with glowing cyan trim and large signage
building front with bright neon signage and illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the rain-soaked street, the camera approaches the entrance to the NCART metro station. Palm trees line the right side of the walkway while neon-lit buildings flank the left. Pedestrians walk in both directions as the station entrance looms ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered NCART metro station plaza with digital signage

events.description: enters the covered NCART metro station area
lighting shifts to more artificial and sheltered from the rain

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered station area, passing under the NCART signage and digital billboards

entered.detail: large illuminated NCART sign with cyan neon lettering hanging from ceiling
large digital advertisement screens showing animated content on the wall
central information desk or vendor booth in the station plaza
patterned tile flooring of the station interior

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the covered NCART metro station, transitioning from the open rain to a sheltered environment with artificial lighting. The station features glowing cyan signage, digital billboards on the walls, and a central kiosk. The tiled floor replaces the wet asphalt as the camera moves through the semi-enclosed plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: street-side pedestrian area with outdoor seating and holographic displays

events.description: exits the covered station back into the open rainy street
slows down and approaches the seated individual at the outdoor seating area

agents.ego_description: walking along the street past outdoor seating with glowing furniture, approaching a seated individual

notable_agents.action: person sitting in glowing outdoor chair near a table, looking at a device

entered.detail: modern outdoor furniture with illuminated bases and round tables
large transparent holographic screen showing advertisements
palm trees reappearing along the street side

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered station, the scene returns to the open rainy street with neon lighting. The camera walks past modern outdoor seating with glowing chairs and a large holographic display wall. The clip ends as the camera approaches a person sitting in one of the illuminated chairs near the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-soaked futuristic city, moving from the open neon streets into a sheltered transit hub and back out into the night. It begins by tilting down from towering, neon-lit skyscrapers to a wet sidewalk reflecting cyan and pink lights as a pedestrian with an umbrella passes by in the light rain. As the camera continues forward, the scene shifts past lining palm trees and glowing buildings toward the looming entrance of the NCART metro station. The environment then transitions from the open rain into the sheltered plaza of the station, where wet asphalt is replaced by tiled floors and the air is filled with artificial light from cyan signage and digital billboards. Finally, the camera exits the covered station to return to the rainy street, gliding past glowing outdoor seating and a large holographic display wall before approaching a person seated in an illuminated chair.
